## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, performance, and workflow improvements for Metadata's blog.](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows promising lift in average position and CTR for refreshed articles](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [24 articles published (9 refreshes, 15 new); 20 more ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Maintaining professional tone in content; will monitor bounce rates to gauge effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Implementing subtle CTAs throughout blog posts to reduce friction for free trial conversions](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Exploring integration of video content from webinars and social media clips into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Metrics

  - [Refreshed articles showing lift in average position and slight improvement in CTR](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [6-position average increase observed, though limited data available](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Team to monitor bounce rates in GA4 to assess content effectiveness and tone](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

### Content Production and Review

  - [24 articles published (9 refreshes, 15 new)](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [20 articles ready for review (5 refreshes, 5 new, 10 in generation stage)](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Goal set: Review 10 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Aida to review links and adjust flow in upcoming batch by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### Content Tone and Style

  - [Maintaining professional, straightforward tone to cater to various audience levels (CMO, director, manager)](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Avoiding casual tone to prevent potential "fluff" and maintain expert positioning](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Current content praised for reduced fluff and improved link quality](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)

### SEO and On-Page Optimizations

  - [Implementing meta titles and descriptions in Airtable for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Exploring internal linking strategies to prioritize specific posts](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Removed competitor and paid media service links from content](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### CTA Implementation

  - [Developing subtle CTAs to sprinkle throughout blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Focus on reducing friction for free trial conversions](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [WordPress widget being created for drag-and-drop CTA placement](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

### Video Content Integration

  - [Short clips being produced by MSDs and PMMs for organic social campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Potential to link relevant video content within blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Exploring use of webinar content (e.g., intent-based topics) in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Considering embedding videos on pages vs. linking to landing pages (pending indexing check)](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### Future Content Possibilities

  - [Discussed synthesizing webinar transcripts into valuable blog content](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Explored idea of leveraging video content in nurture campaigns and post-conversion experiences](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Anthony to review 5 articles today, 5 tomorrow (aiming for 10/week)](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Aida to review upcoming refresh batch, double-checking for appropriate links](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Implement meta title and description columns in Airtable for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Anthony to research video content repository for potential blog integration](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Monitor content performance metrics (esp. bounce rates) to assess tone effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Proceed with CTA implementation throughout blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/sx_P_YHWjvp32J2GWz3DEsc4xAwG2kHS?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
